summary: Completed comprehensive backend API testing for Giggles family memory sharing platform. Tested FastAPI proxy server, Next.js backend integration, mobile authentication, family/child management, and memory creation flow.

flaky_endpoints.issue: BSONError during memory creation with AI tagging - ObjectId serialization issue
flaky_endpoints.symptoms: 500 Internal Server Error when AI tagging is involved
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Basic memory creation works, issue appears with AI integration

configuration_issues.note: Core functionality works without AI tagging

configuration_issues.impact: Expected - app works without Redis as mentioned in context

passed_tests: Backend API health check via FastAPI proxy
CORS headers for mobile app compatibility
action_item_for_main_agent: Update OpenAI API key in backend/.env.local to enable AI tagging functionality. Current key (sk-emerg...2606) returns 401 errors. Also investigate BSONError in memory creation with AI tagging - likely ObjectId serialization issue in the AI tagging flow.
